description: Baidu ERNIE Content-Length fix test. Changed Content-Length: 0 to {{BODY_INNER_LENGTH}} in baidu_sse_v2 template. Previous issue: ERNIE UI ignored APF SSE content.

test_messages.expected_behavior: warning text should appear in chat area instead of being silently ignored

check_items: Is the block response delivered (etap log blocked=1)?
Does the ERNIE chat area display the warning text?
Does the page show any error messages?
